_description: Clear hepatitic pattern — classic NAFLD. Obese, diabetic, asymptomatic. No red flags. Straightforward diagnosis path. Expected: no dilemma, NAFLD diagnosis, monitoring required.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(hepatitic) → HEPATITIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(no) → CONSULTATION → EDUCATION → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE

symptoms: asymptomatic - elevated liver enzymes found on routine screening
